name: Chocolate Thumbprint Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine (softened, equivalent to 1 stick)
1 cup Chopped nuts (pecan halves or candied cherry halves)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, egg yolk, milk, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Stir together flour, cocoa, and salt; gradually add to the butter mixture, beating until blended.
3. Refrigerate dough for at least 1 hour or until firm enough to handle.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Beat egg white slightly.
7. Dip each ball in the egg white, then roll in nuts. Place on the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Press gently with thumb in the center of each cookie.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for about 5 minutes.
10. Spoon about 1/4 teaspoon filling into each thumbprint. Gently press a chocolate piece into the center of each cookie.
11. Allow to cool completely.
VANILLA FILLING:
- In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, softened butter or margarine, milk, and vanilla extract; beat until smooth.
